news_title: American Trust Investment Services Serves as Exclusive Placement Agent in $9 Million Follow-On Offering for Nova LifeStyle, Inc.
summary: Nova LifeStyle (NASDAQ: NVFY)has completed a $9 million follow-on public offering with American Trust Investment Services (ATIS) as the exclusive placement agent. The offering included9,836,054 sharesof common stock and19,672,108 warrants, priced at$0.915per share with accompanying warrants.Each share came with two five-year warrants exercisable at$1.098(120% of the offering price). Nova LifeStyle, a U.S.-based designer and marketer of modern furniture, plans to use the proceeds for working capital, marketing initiatives, debt repayment, and general corporate purposes.
